records.short_description: Production file upload completely broken for ACME Corp tenant
records.description: ACME Corp (account ID: ACC-9921) reports 100% failure rate on file uploads since 2026-06-17 18:00 UTC. Uploads return HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout after 30 seconds. Affects all files regardless of size. VP of Engineering at ACME has sent escalation email to our VP. This is a revenue-impacting P1 incident. Customer SLA: 1 business day response, 4-hour resolution. SLA expires 2026-06-20 09:00 UTC.
records.business_impact: 100% upload failure for $2M ARR customer. VP escalation active.

records.short_description: API latency SLA breach — P99 at 480ms against 200ms SLA
records.description: Production API P99 latency measured at 480ms over the past 48 hours. Enterprise contract with GlobalTech (account ACC-7745) stipulates P99 < 200ms. Contract SLA breach threshold crossed at 2026-06-17 00:00 UTC. GlobalTech CSM has been notified. Failure to remediate by 2026-06-22 triggers contract penalty clause ($50K).
records.business_impact: $50K contract penalty if not resolved by 2026-06-22.

records.short_description: Security incident: AWS credentials found in public git history
records.description: On 2026-06-17 at 22:45 UTC, automated secret scanner detected AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID and AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY belonging to the CI/CD service account committed to the repository in branch feature/analytics-export, commit abc1234. Keys have NOT been rotated yet as of this record. Potential unauthorized access window: 2 hours before detection. Security team has initiated incident response. Keys must be rotated IMMEDIATELY.
records.business_impact: Active credential exposure. Potential unauthorized AWS resource access.

records.short_description: Mobile authentication: users being silently logged out
records.description: Support has received 47 tickets in the last 72 hours from iOS and Android users reporting unexpected logouts. Users are not shown any error message — the app simply returns to the login screen. Affects approximately 12% of mobile daily active users based on session termination telemetry. Root cause under investigation by mobile team.
records.business_impact: 47 support tickets. 12% mobile DAU affected. App store rating risk.

records.short_description: Database connection pool exhaustion causing 5-second request timeouts
records.description: Between 09:00–10:30 UTC daily, the PostgreSQL connection pool reaches maximum capacity (100 connections). New incoming API requests queue and timeout after 5 seconds. SRE team received PagerDuty alerts at 09:12, 09:34, and 09:58 UTC on 2026-06-18. Total impact: ~800 failed API requests across the peak window. DBA team has been engaged to provision a read replica.
records.business_impact: 800+ failed requests during peak daily window. PagerDuty oncall 3x.

records.short_description: Notification service OOM crash loop — notifications delayed 6-8 hours
records.description: The notification-service container has been OOM-killed and restarting every 6–8 hours since 2026-06-15. During the restart window, all push notifications, email digests, and in-app alerts are queued but not delivered. Customers are experiencing 6–8 hour notification delays. SRE has applied a temporary memory limit increase to 2GB but the underlying leak must be fixed.
records.resolution_notes: Temporary: increased memory limit to 2GB. Permanent fix in progress.
records.business_impact: 6-8h notification blackout windows. Customer-visible service degradation.

records.short_description: CVE-2026-31240: critical RCE vulnerability in log4js v2.3.1
records.description: NVD published CVE-2026-31240 on 2026-06-18 affecting log4js versions prior to 2.4.0. Our production services use log4js 2.3.1. CVSS score: 9.8 (Critical). Remote code execution is possible via crafted log input. Patch available: upgrade to 2.4.1. All services using log4js must be patched and redeployed within 24 hours per security policy.
records.business_impact: CVSS 9.8 RCE vulnerability. 24-hour patch SLA per security policy.

records.short_description: Payment webhook delivery failure rate at 34%
records.description: Payment processor callback webhooks are failing at a 34% rate over the past 24 hours. No retry logic is implemented. Failed webhooks result in orders being stuck in 'pending' state. Finance team reports 127 orders affected. Manual reconciliation in progress but unsustainable. Engineering must implement webhook retry with exponential backoff.
records.resolution_notes: Manual reconciliation ongoing. PR #892 in review.
records.business_impact: 127 stuck orders. Finance team manually reconciling. Revenue recognition risk.

records.short_description: TLS certificate for api.taskpilot.io expiring in 4 days
records.description: TLS certificate for api.taskpilot.io expires at 2026-06-23T00:00:00Z. Auto-renewal via Let's Encrypt failed on 2026-06-16 due to DNS propagation delay from a recent domain migration. Manual renewal or DNS correction required. All API clients will begin receiving certificate errors starting 2026-06-23.
records.business_impact: Total API outage for all clients if not renewed by 2026-06-23.

records.short_description: Elasticsearch index corruption — search results returning stale data
records.description: The primary Elasticsearch index for the task search feature has partially corrupted data. Users report search results returning deleted tasks and missing recently-created ones. Issue started after the cluster failover on 2026-06-17. Re-indexing is required but will take approximately 45 minutes of downtime. Must be scheduled during maintenance window.
records.business_impact: Search showing stale/deleted data. Trust impact for all users.

records.short_description: GDPR data deletion request: user ACC-USER-55391 not actioned within 30 days
records.description: A verified GDPR right-to-erasure request for user account ACC-USER-55391 was submitted on 2026-05-20. The 30-day legal deadline was 2026-06-19. Automated deletion job failed silently on 2026-06-05 due to a missing foreign key cascade on the user_sessions table. Legal team has been notified. Manual deletion must be executed today.
records.business_impact: GDPR breach. €20M fine risk (4% global turnover). Legal on standby.

records.short_description: Backup restore test failed: 2 of 5 database backups unrestorable
records.description: Weekly restore verification (automated) ran on 2026-06-15 and failed for 2 of 5 database backups in the S3 archive. Corruption detected at restore step. These backups cover data from 2026-06-09 and 2026-06-12. July compliance audit requires documented restore success for the past 90 days.
records.business_impact: 2 corrupt backups. July audit finding risk.

records.short_description: Partner rate limit: PartnerCo hitting undocumented API limits
records.description: PartnerCo's integration is intermittently receiving HTTP 429 errors from our API. No documented rate limits exist for partners, but an internal default limit of 500 req/min is being silently enforced by the infrastructure layer. PartnerCo technical lead is asking for documentation and clarity on limits.
records.business_impact: PartnerCo integration intermittently broken. Partner satisfaction at risk.

records.short_description: Staging environment unavailable — blocking QA for 3 sprints
records.description: The staging environment has been unreachable since a failed Terraform apply on 2026-06-14. QA team cannot run automated regression tests. Three sprints of code changes are queued for QA validation. SRE has been investigating but the Terraform state file is corrupted.
records.resolution_notes: Terraform state recovery in progress. Estimated fix: 2026-06-19 EOD.
records.business_impact: QA blocked for 3 sprints. Release pipeline frozen.

records.short_description: Data export feature generating incomplete CSV files for enterprise accounts
records.description: Enterprise accounts using the data export feature receive CSV files with truncated rows when the export dataset exceeds 10,000 records. The issue is caused by a memory limit in the export worker that causes premature termination. VendorX (account ACC-8831) reported this after a critical data reconciliation exercise produced incorrect results.
records.business_impact: VendorX data reconciliation incorrect. Enterprise customer trust at risk.
